name: Mail Sender
description: Send physical mail (letters and postcards) in the US via PostalForm using x402 USDC payments on Base.

data.label: Mail Sender
data.name: Mail Sender
data.description: Send physical mail (letters and postcards) in the US via PostalForm. Supports user-provided PDFs, auto-generation from a text message, and AI-generated postcard artwork. Single recipient per send.
data.useCases: Mail a letter to someone; send a postcard with a custom message or AI-generated image; mail a PDF document; auto-generate a letter from a short text message.
data.notFor: Not for mass mail / bulk campaigns, international recipients (US-only delivery), or sending to multiple recipients in one call.

data.label: Mail Type
data.description: Letter or postcard? Letters support color/double-sided/certified options. Postcards are always color, double-sided, standard class.

data.label: Recipient (US address)
data.description: Full name + US street address (line1, optional line2, city, 2-letter state, 5-digit ZIP). Recipient must be in the US — PostalForm delivers to US addresses only.
data.placeholder: Jane Doe, 100 Main St, Springfield, IL 62701

data.label: Content
data.description: Provide one of: (A) a public PDF URL, (B) a local PDF file path, (C) a text message that will be wrapped in a clean HTML letter template, or (D) for postcards, a short description of the artwork to AI-generate via recraft-v3.
data.placeholder: PDF URL, file path, message, or image prompt

data.label: Generate Postcard Artwork (recraft-v3)
data.description: Optional — only when the user wants an AI-generated postcard. Generates a flat illustration via recraft-v3 on fal.ai. Strip card-related words from the prompt; default to a hand-drawn doodle aesthetic if no style specified. Auto-map size: 4x6/6x9 → 1800x1200, 11x6 → 2200x1200. Poll the request_id endpoint until COMPLETED, then download to ~/Downloads/postcard-artwork.webp and Read it inline before asking the user to confirm.

data.label: Validate Order (PostalForm)
data.description: Pre-flight validation. Returns errors for malformed addresses, missing fields, or unsupported options. Show validation errors to the user in plain language and re-validate after fixes.

data.label: Confirm Before Sending
data.instruction:
Show a one-screen summary to the user before payment:
- Mail type, options (letter color/class/certified, postcard size)
- Recipient name + address
- Sender name + address (read from data/sender.md if saved)
- Content source (PDF URL, auto-generated letter, or AI artwork preview)
- Estimated cost: ~$1-3 USDC

Wait for explicit user confirmation. Do not auto-proceed.

data.label: Send Mail (PostalForm)
data.description: Submit the validated order. PostalForm charges via x402 USDC on Base. Returns 202 with an order_id on success. Generate a fresh UUID v4 for request_id.

data.label: Check Status (PostalForm)
data.description: Fetch current step / tracking for the submitted order_id. Report initial status to the user — no need to poll repeatedly. The user can re-run this later for updates.

data.label: Confirmation + Tracking
data.description: Order ID, current status, estimated delivery, and (for letters) tracking URL. After successful send, save new recipient to data/recipient_<firstname_lastname>.md and sender to data/sender.md.
